known_issues: Members cannot login after admin reactivates paused membership - login fails with 'contact gym' message

existing_features.title: Ensure the member authentication flow in useMemberAuth.ts properly handles reactivated memberships and does not cache stale pause status
Verify that the membership status update flow in the admin MembersTab correctly persists status changes and invalidates relevant queries

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix the backend member login validation logic to correctly recognize members whose membership status has been changed from paused back to active by an admin

projectName: Fix member login after membership reactivation
